description_long: This is a rugged, mid-ankle hiking boot featuring a combination of brown and black materials, likely leather and synthetic fabric, with reinforced toe and heel caps for durability. The upper section is constructed with multiple stitched panels, providing both structural support and a visually layered appearance. The lacing system uses metal eyelets and hooks, allowing for secure fastening and adjustment. The collar and tongue are padded for comfort, and the interior appears to be lined with a soft, breathable material. The outsole is thick and textured, designed for traction on various surfaces, and the overall build suggests weather resistance. A visible logo patch is present on the tongue, adding a branded touch to the design.
description: A sturdy, brown and black mid-ankle hiking boot with reinforced toe and heel, padded collar, and a rugged, textured sole. Features a visible logo patch on the tongue and a secure lacing system.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, reinforced cap, central lacing system, and a prominent logo patch on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered panel construction, metal eyelets, padded collar, and the rugged sole profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel collar, heel pull tab, and the back seam with reinforced stitching.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the layered materials, lacing, and the robust sole.
attribute_logo: Rectangular yellow and black logo patch on the tongue
